title: thymophylla tenuiloba var. treculii
intro: Thymophylla tenuiloba var. treculii, also known as Trecul's silverleaf or narrowleaf silverleaf, is a perennial herb that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Thymophylla tenuiloba var. treculii include reducing fever and pain, as well as treating wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
